questions.question: Highlight a sentence or phrase from the text that supports your answer to Part A.
Part A: Which of the following abilities does the narrator mainly believe older people have that younger people don't?

responses.content: This is when she i wish she wasn't eleven because all the years inside of me -ten,nine,eight,seven,six,five,four,three,two,and, one-are pushing at the back of my eyes when I put one arm through one sleeve of the sweater that smalls like cottage cheese, and then the other and stand there with my arms apart like if the sweater hurts me and it does, all itchy and full of germs that aren't even mine. that's when everything l've been holding in since this morning, since when Mrs.price put the sweater on my desk, finally lets go, and all of a sudden I'm crying in front of everybody.
